title: convolvulus otites
intro: Convolvulus otites, also known as the "bugbane" or "devil's claw," is a plant species native to various parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects, which is due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other compounds. The health benefits of Convolvulus otites include its potential use as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, Convolvulus otites is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption and use.
